title: Data analysis code for mutations in mtDNA-mutator mice
author: Battersby lab
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Data analysis pipeline for the manuscript "Intrinsic errors in mitochondrial translation trigger a decline in cell fitness". Contains code to quantify mitochondrial heteroplasmic variants in RNA seq, differential expression analysis and long read haplotype analysis.
steps_raw: Data analysis pipeline for the manuscript "Intrinsic errors in mitochondrial translation trigger a decline in cell fitness". Contains code to quantify mitochondrial heteroplasmic variants in RNA seq, differential expression analysis and long read haplotype analysis.
